name: Level Access
workflow: Review public accessibility/resources/contact workflow. Stop before submitting any form.
notes: Public-page workflow only. Do not log in, submit forms, create accounts, send messages, or interact with payment/support-ticket flows.

name: Coursera
workflow: Review public learning/help/accessibility workflow. Stop before submitting any form.
notes: Use this target only if the audit produces strong public-access findings. The public emails are not perfect for accessibility feedback. Public-page workflow only. Do not log in, submit forms, create accounts, send messages, or interact with payment/support-ticket flows.

name: RNIB
workflow: Review public support/resources/contact workflow. Stop before submitting any form.
notes: Official page says there is a helpline email, but it was rendered as protected text. Do not invent the email. Visually confirm the email from the official page before outreach. Public-page workflow only. Do not log in, submit forms, create accounts, send messages, or interact with payment/support-ticket flows.
